```{=html}
<style>
  body {
    font-family: sans-serif;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
  .areas-of-interest {
    text-align: center;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 120%;
    padding: 20px;
  }
  .areas-of-interest h1 {
    font-size: 2em;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    text-algin: center;
  }
  .areas-of-interest p {
    font-size: 1em;
    font-family: cursive;
    line-height: 1.5;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .colu {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
    justify-items: center;
  }
  .colus {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    padding: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 5px;
    background-color: #294054;
  }
  .colu h3 {
    font-size: 1.5em;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .colu {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .colu {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }
</style>
```

```{=html}
</head>
<body>
  <section class="areas-of-interest">
    <h2>Areas of Interest</h2>
    <div class="colu">
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>Data Science</h3>
        <p>I enjoy analytical thinking, data-driven decisions, and posting about Data Science on LinkedIn.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>Machine Learning</h3>
        <p>Strong grasp of ML theory and concepts when physical modeling isn't an option.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>Cloud Computing</h3>
        <p>Self-taught in Big Data and certified in Snowflake for data warehousing.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>NLP</h3>
        <p>Worked on sentiment analysis of news articles and ML modeling with text data.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>Applied Statistics</h3>
        <p>Run simulations and calculate uncertainties using open-source data and statistics.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>Data Visualization</h3>
        <p>Expert in ggplot for scientific aesthetics and informative visualizations in R.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</body>

  
```
